name: Rhumb
description: Agent-native tool intelligence — discover, evaluate, and execute external tools with trust scores, failure modes, cost-aware routing, and managed credentials.

discovery.description: Search, score, and evaluate 1,038 services across 50+ domains

tools.name: find_services
tools.description: Search services by capability, domain, or name

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get AN Score breakdown (0-10) for a service

tools.name: get_alternatives
tools.description: Find ranked alternatives to any service

tools.name: get_failure_modes
tools.description: Get known failure patterns before integrating

tools.name: resolve_capability
tools.description: Get ranked providers for a capability

execution.description: Execute capabilities through Resolve with managed auth and cost-aware routing

tools.name: credential_ceremony
tools.description: Set up credentials for a provider

tools.name: rhumb_list_recipes
tools.description: Check the current public Layer 3 recipe catalog; it may still be empty

tools.name: rhumb_get_recipe
tools.description: Inspect a recipe definition only after it appears in the public catalog

tools.name: rhumb_recipe_execute
tools.description: Execute a published Layer 3 recipe after confirming it is live in the public catalog
